title: Finding Row Space Basis
description: Algorithm to find basis for row space using REF
code:
FUNCTION FindRowSpaceBasis(A)
 // Input: matrix A (m×n)
 // Output: basis for row space
 BEGIN
 B <- RowReduceToREF(A) // Get row echelon form
 basis <- empty list
 FOR each row in B DO
 IF row is not zero vector THEN
 Add row to basis
 END IF
 END FOR
 RETURN basis
 END
explanation: Row reduce matrix to REF, non-zero rows form basis

title: Finding Column Space Basis
description: Algorithm to find basis for column space using RREF
code:
FUNCTION FindColumnSpaceBasis(A)
 // Input: matrix A (m×n)
 // Output: basis for column space
 BEGIN
 B <- ReducedRowEchelonForm(A)
 pivot_cols <- FindPivotColumns(B)
 basis <- empty list
 FOR each index i in pivot_cols DO
 Add column A[i] to basis // Original columns
 END FOR
 RETURN basis
 END
explanation: RREF reveals pivot columns, original columns at those positions form basis

title: Computing Rank
description: Algorithm to compute rank of a matrix
code:
FUNCTION ComputeRank(A)
 // Input: matrix A
 // Output: rank of A
 BEGIN
 B <- RowReduceToREF(A)
 rank <- 0
 FOR each row in B DO
 IF row is not zero vector THEN
 rank <- rank + 1
 END IF
 END FOR
 RETURN rank
 END
explanation: Rank equals number of non-zero rows in REF

title: Finding Null Space Basis
description: Algorithm to find basis for null space using RREF
code:
FUNCTION FindNullSpaceBasis(A)
 // Input: matrix A (m×n)
 // Output: basis for null space
 BEGIN
 B <- RREF(A)
 free_vars <- FindFreeVariables(B)
 basis <- empty list
 FOR each free variable x_j DO
 solution <- SolveForParametricSolution(B, x_j)
 Add solution to basis
 END FOR
 RETURN basis
 END
explanation: RREF gives parametric form of Ax=0, each free variable gives one basis vector
